items.title: Breach Reporting – Hard 30-Day Deadline
items.desc: No extensions under CA 912DAA / RG 78. Clock starts from knowledge of or recklessness as to the breach. Calibrate the Breaches Register escalation workflow.

items.title: FS70 / FS71 Audit Lodgement – 31 Oct 2026
items.desc: Annual financial statements and audit report must be lodged within 4 months of 30 June FY close. Engage auditor now. (CA 989A–D, AFSL Condition)

items.title: Conflicts of Interest – Enhanced ASIC Scrutiny 2026
items.desc: Ensure Conflicts Register captures perceived conflicts and FSG/SOA disclosure language is current. (CA 912A(1)(aa))

items.title: Compliance Officer Notification – 30 May 2026
items.desc: Confirm AUSTRAC notification of your AML/CTF Compliance Officer is complete and records are current.

items.title: Tranche 2 Enrolment – Deadline 29 Jul 2026
items.desc: Lawyers, accountants, real estate professionals newly regulated from 1 Jul 2026. Update counterparty CDD procedures. (s51B AML/CTF Act)

items.title: Travel Rule – Virtual Asset Transfers (New – 1 Jul 2026)
items.desc: VASPs must exchange customer information on virtual asset transfers. Assess whether fund activities trigger this obligation.

items.title: Enhanced Ongoing CDD Standard (Live – 31 Mar 2026)
items.desc: Updated CDD obligations already in effect. Confirm transaction monitoring and training are updated to the new standard.

items.title: AER Separates from ACCC (Watch – 1 Jul 2026)
items.desc: AER becomes fully independent. Monitor transition communications for changes to reporting portals and contact points.

items.title: Enhanced Concession Disclosure – Retail Code (New – 1 Jul 2026)
items.desc: Retailers must provide more frequent concession/rebate information. Update practices if portfolio companies hold energy retail authorisations.

items.title: Half-Yearly Breach Reports (Deadline – 31 Aug 2026)
items.desc: AER-regulated entities submit half-yearly compliance/breach reports by 28 Feb and 31 Aug each year.

items.title: Hardship Customer Pricing Controls (Watch – Dec 2026)
items.desc: Hardship customers must pay no more than the "deemed better offer". Controls tested in assurance audits after this date.
